---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Thomas Atkinson"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Thomas Atkinson

**Dates:** (1807-1881)

### Description

episcopal Bishop of North Carolina 1853-81

### Biography

He preached at Babbacombe in 1867.

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
